title: Defence Equipment & Support - Public Body Review 2025
body: "The Ministry of Defence undertook a review of Defence Equipment Support as part of the Cabinet Office’s Public Bodies Review Programme between April and August 2024.  The review aimed to assess whether DE&S was:    Operating efficiently, realising at least 5% RDEL (resource departmental expenditure limits) savings against the 2022/23 financial year budget baseline.   Operating with efficacy, established in the correct form for delivery and with a clear purpose.   Operating with accountability, with clear and effective sponsoring and communication in place.   Operating with good governance structures across its board and subcommittees in line with Cabinet Office guidance. The review’s first stage was a Self Assessment Model (SAM).    "

taxons.title: Armed forces and Ministry of Defence reform
